commands.review_summary:
The branch adds opt-in reset-family transcript lookup to chat history and `sessions_history`, then injects one reset-archive compaction summary into embedded-agent prompt context when active history lacks one, with protocol, Swift, snapshot, and regression-test updates.

PR surface: Source +318, Tests +219, Other +4. Total +541 across 27 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main persists reset lineage but `chat.history` reads only the active transcript and embedded-agent context uses current messages only. The PR body's terminal smoke gives a concrete on-disk path for the proposed resolver/transform behavior, though I did not rerun it in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainers need to decide the compatibility and session-state contract and coordinate the stacked dependency; there is no narrow automated repair to queue from this review.
